title: Implement spread algorithm utility (elliptical sampling pure function)

reference_files.reason: Step 6: Spread algorithm - elliptical sampling, r=sqrt(random), theta in [0,2pi), horizontal/vertical deflection formulas, server-side execution

acceptance_criteria: SpreadCalculator utility class created with pure static method applySpread(Vec3 lookAngle, double accuracyYaw, double accuracyPitch, RandomSource random) returning Vec3
Horizontal deflection = r * accuracyYaw * cos(theta), vertical deflection = r * accuracyPitch * sin(theta)
Look angle vector rotated by vertical deflection (around horizontal axis) then horizontal deflection (around vertical axis)
When accuracyYaw == accuracyPitch, spread range is circular; when unequal, elliptical
Method is pure (no side effects, same inputs + same random state = same output)
